name: Nukor
description: Creates and focuses a high-frequency field of microwaves, literally cooking the target from within.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Creates and focuses a high-frequency field of microwaves, literally cooking the target from within.

components.name: Detonite Injector
components.description:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

Location: Clan Research (Chem Lab in the Dojo) and Grineer Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.2
patchlogs.changes: Changed the Kuva Nukor description from "hit up to four" to "hit up to two" as it now hits two additional targets.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.changes:
We are indeed touching 1 non-Melee item in the series of Nerfs, and likely to no one’s surprise it’s the Kuva Nukor. It’s a dominant Secondary with incredible power, which is warranted given its acquisition. It’ll keep all of its signature behaviour, but the general output is being notched down slightly with the following change:
After the original publication of our Dev Workshop, we observed and noted that the Vermisplicer’s behaviour is very similar to the Kuva Nukor. To this end, we wanted to ensure we were consistent in handling the beam chain weapons in this update.
Any Player who owns a Kuva Nukor will receive an extra 2 x Built Forma.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kuva Nukor Critical hits doing more damage to chained targets than the initial target.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed the Kuva Nukor, Kuva Hind, and Kuva Bramma weapon progression showing as complete in the Codex when at Rank 30 instead of it’s true completed Rank of 40.
Optimized the Kuva Nukor’s FX.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes: Nukor ammo capacity reduced to 60 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed poor optimization on weapons like the Ignos, Nukor, and Cycron.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Nukor creating a ton of FX if it kills something while it's been paused by Harrow's Condemn ability.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a rare script error with the Nukor.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: This bundle of Nightwatch Skins suits the Ack & Brunt, Ogris and Nukor. They have been modeled after the camouflage employed by the Nightwatch Corps, an elite squadron in the Grineer Military.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed coloring on Nukor as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/457936-update-1655/page-2#entry5097301

patchlogs.name: Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Orokin Shield Drones would rotate onto their sides when shot by the Nukor.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.6.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Tweaked the sound effects of the Nukor pistol.
Improved the performance of the Nukor on low end computers.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the magazine drop animation not playing properly on the Nukor and Galaxion.
